title: Cinematic Hotel Interior - Concept
prompt: Ultra-wide angle shot, creative architectural composition, interior of a premium resort hotel lobby. Cinematic lighting, rich chiaroscuro shadows, high-end photography, 8k resolution, photorealistic. Strictly no close-up portraits, full scene context.

title: Storyboarding - Narrative Sequence
prompt: Professional storyboard sequence, wide shot. Scene with a child actor naturally interacting with the indoor environment. Dramatic lighting, strict adherence to narrative flow, cinematic color grading suitable for Adobe Premiere Pro post-production matching.

title: Commercial Product - Michelin Style
prompt: High-end commercial culinary photography, Michelin-star restaurant styling. Top-down creative angle, perfect studio lighting, sharp focus on texture, isolated against a dark mood background.
